initial_program:
% Dimensions
n_cols(Nc) :- Nc = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
k(K) :- K = #count{ R, C, V : input(R, C, V), V != 0 }.
size(SZ) :- SZ = n_cols * K.
output_row(0..SZ-1) :- size(SZ).
output_col(0..SZ-1) :- size(SZ).
output_cell(R,C) :- output_row(R), output_col(C).

% For each nonzero input cell compute offset
offset(I,O) :- input(0,I,V), V != 0, O = #count{ C2 : input(0, C2, V2), V2 != 0, C2 > I } * n_cols.

% Place the value on a diagonal of length n_cols for each nonzero cell
output(O+I,    n_cols-1,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
output(O+I+1,  n_cols-2,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
output(O+I+2,  n_cols-3,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
output(O+I+3,  n_cols-4,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
output(O+I+4,  n_cols-5,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.

% Ensure exactly one colour for each output cell
1 { output(R,C,Colour) : colour(Colour) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

% Auxiliary constraints to enforce correct colours
:- output(R,C,Colour), offset(I,O), I = input_row, offset(I,O) = #count{ C2 : input(0, C2, V2), V2 != 0, C2 > I } * n_cols, input(0,I,V), V = Colour, I = I.
:- output(R,C,Colour), offset(I,O), offset(I,O) = #count{ C2 : input(0, C2, V2), V2 != 0, C2 > I } * n_cols, input(0,I,V), V != Colour, Color = 0.

#show output/3.

<block>:23:115-116: error: syntax error, unexpected *, expecting "," or . or ;
<block>:24:100-101: error: syntax error, unexpected *, expecting "," or . or ;

rounds.program_after:
% Dimensions
n_cols(Nc) :- Nc = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
k(K) :- K = #count{ R, C, V : input(R, C, V), V != 0 }.
size(SZ) :- SZ = n_cols * K.
output_row(0..SZ-1) :- size(SZ).
output_col(0..SZ-1) :- size(SZ).
output_cell(R,C) :- output_row(R), output_col(C).

% For each nonzero input cell compute offset
offset(I,O) :- input(0,I,V), V != 0, O = #count{ C2 : input(0, C2, V2), V2 != 0, C2 > I }.

% Place the value on a diagonal of length n_cols for each nonzero cell
output(O+I,    n_cols-1,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
output(O+I+1,  n_cols-2,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
output(O+I+2,  n_cols-3,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
output(O+I+3,  n_cols-4,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
output(O+I+4,  n_cols-5,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.

% Ensure exactly one colour for each output cell
1 { output(R,C,Colour) : colour(Colour) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

% Auxiliary constraints to enforce correct colours
:- output(R,C,Colour), offset(I,O), I = input_row, offset(I,O) = #count{ C2 : input(0, C2, V2), V2 != 0, C2 > I }, input(0,I,V), V = Colour, I = I.
:- output(R,C,Colour), offset(I,O), offset(I,O) = #count{ C2 : input(0, C2, V2), V2 != 0, C2 > I }, input(0,I,V), V != Colour, Color = 0.

#show output/3.

final_program:
% Dimensions
n_cols(Nc) :- Nc = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
k(K) :- K = #count{ R, C, V : input(R, C, V), V != 0 }.
size(SZ) :- SZ = n_cols * K.
output_row(0..SZ-1) :- size(SZ).
output_col(0..SZ-1) :- size(SZ).
output_cell(R,C) :- output_row(R), output_col(C).

% For each nonzero input cell compute offset
offset(I,O) :- input(0,I,V), V != 0, O = #count{ C2 : input(0, C2, V2), V2 != 0, C2 > I }.

% Place the value on a diagonal of length n_cols for each nonzero cell
output(O+I,    n_cols-1,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
output(O+I+1,  n_cols-2,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
output(O+I+2,  n_cols-3,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
output(O+I+3,  n_cols-4,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
output(O+I+4,  n_cols-5,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.

% Ensure exactly one colour for each output cell
1 { output(R,C,Colour) : colour(Colour) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

% Auxiliary constraints to enforce correct colours
:- output(R,C,Colour), offset(I,O), I = input_row, offset(I,O) = #count{ C2 : input(0, C2, V2), V2 != 0, C2 > I }, input(0,I,V), V = Colour, I = I.
:- output(R,C,Colour), offset(I,O), offset(I,O) = #count{ C2 : input(0, C2, V2), V2 != 0, C2 > I }, input(0,I,V), V != Colour, Color = 0.

#show output/3.
